name: libsqlite3-0
title: libsqlite3-0
description:
SQLite 3 shared library
SQLite is a C library that implements an SQL database engine.
Programs that link with the SQLite library can have SQL database
access without running a separate RDBMS process.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsqlite3-0 because SQLite 3 shared library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsqlite3-0 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsqlite3-0 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsqlite3-0 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
